cases.title: Testing-plan GPS validation block enabled when FR-24 configures gpsRequired and gpsRadiusMeters at section scope
preconditions: Testing-plan §3.1 GPS validation coverage block applies (FR-34, FR-35, BR-08/09/10, AC-09, AC-10).
Class section exists with room coordinates configured for radius checks.
No prior section-scoped policy overrides gpsRequired for the target section.
AcademicAdmin auth context is available to M06 Policy Engine.
steps: Create section-scoped AttendancePolicy via M06 with gpsRequired true and gpsRadiusMeters 100 per FR-24 field set.
Invoke resolveEffectivePolicy(classSectionId, sessionTimestamp) for an upcoming session in that section.
Assert resolved effective policy exposes gpsRequired true and gpsRadiusMeters 100.
Verify policy snapshot fields required by AC-09 (GPS-required rejection path) and AC-10 (out-of-radius handling) are present in the resolved policy.
cases.expected: Scenario-matrix maps FR-24 policy configuration to the testing-plan GPS validation row: section-scoped gpsRequired and gpsRadiusMeters persist and surface in effective policy resolution, enabling downstream AC-09 and AC-10 validation paths at check-in time.

cases.title: M06 Policy Engine persists class-section scoped policy with all FR-24 fields in attendance_policies
preconditions: Integration harness uses real DB transaction boundaries for attendance_policies table.
Class section fixture exists with known classSectionId.
AcademicAdmin actor context is wired to M06 policy configuration service.
steps: Submit policy configuration payload with scopeType ClassSection, scopeId classSectionId, checkInOpeningOffsetMinutes 5, presentWindowMinutes 15, lateWindowMinutes 15, autoCloseEnabled true, absenceThresholdPercent 20, excusedCountsTowardThreshold false, manualEditWindowHours 48, adminApprovalRequired false, gpsRequired true, gpsRadiusMeters 100.
Query attendance_policies row by scope_type and scope_id within the same transaction.
Verify numeric CHECK constraints (present_window_minutes > 0, absence_threshold_percent 0–100, gps_radius_meters > 0) are satisfied.
Call resolveEffectivePolicy(classSectionId, now) and assert returned values match persisted configuration.
cases.expected: M06 commits a single active AttendancePolicy row at ClassSection scope with all FR-24 behavioral fields persisted per database design §4.5; resolveEffectivePolicy returns the configured values for the section without requiring a separate read path.

cases.title: M06 persists institution default policy and faculty/course/section overrides at each PolicyScopeType
preconditions: Institution, faculty, course, and class section fixtures exist in hierarchy order.
No conflicting active policies exist at target scopes before test.
AcademicAdmin auth context is available.
steps: Create institution-scoped policy with scopeType Institution and scopeId null; record institution presentWindowMinutes 10.
Create faculty-scoped policy with presentWindowMinutes 12 for the parent faculty.
Create course-scoped policy with presentWindowMinutes 14 for the parent course.
Create class-section-scoped policy with presentWindowMinutes 20 for the target section.
Query attendance_policies for all four scope_type values and verify distinct rows committed.
Invoke resolveEffectivePolicy for the class section and assert presentWindowMinutes 20 (most specific wins per BR-20).
cases.expected: FR-24 supports all four scope levels (institution, faculty, course, class section); each scope persists independently in attendance_policies; BR-20 precedence resolves section override over course, faculty, and institution defaults.

cases.title: GET /v1/policies list pagination honors page and pageSize boundaries within admin scope
preconditions: Database seed contains more than 25 attendance policy rows across scope levels.
AcademicAdmin auth context is established.
steps: Call GET /v1/policies?page=1&pageSize=25 and record totalItems and row count.
Call GET /v1/policies?page=2&pageSize=25 and assert disjoint result set from page 1.
Request a page beyond totalPages and assert empty data array with stable totalItems.
Apply scopeLevel filter (e.g. ClassSection) and verify pagination totalItems reflects filtered scoped count only.
cases.expected: Policy listing returns correct page boundaries per API conventions §2.5; totalItems remains stable across pages; filtered queries paginate within authorized scope without cross-scope count leakage.

cases.title: POST /v1/policies returns 200 with standard envelope and persisted policy fields
preconditions: AcademicAdmin is authenticated with bearer token and Idempotency-Key header.
Target class section exists in institution scope.
Request body includes scopeType ClassSection, scopeId, presentWindowMinutes, lateWindowMinutes, manualEditWindowHours, gpsRequired, and absenceThresholdPercent per FR-24.
steps: Send POST /v1/policies with Authorization and Idempotency-Key headers.
Validate HTTP status 200 and JSON envelope shape {data, meta, error} with error null.

Assert data contains id, scopeType, scopeId, presentWindowMinutes, lateWindowMinutes, gpsRequired, gpsRadiusMeters (when gpsRequired true), manualEditWindowHours, absenceThresholdPercent, and isActive fields consistent with request.
Call GET /v1/policies/{policyId} or filter GET /v1/policies by scope to confirm persistence.
cases.expected: Create returns HTTP 200 with standard envelope; data reflects all submitted FR-24 policy attributes; meta includes requestId and timestamp; persisted policy is retrievable by id or scope filter.

cases.title: POST /v1/auth/login as AcademicAdmin then GET /v1/me before policy configuration
preconditions: AcademicAdmin test account exists with known credentials.
No active bearer token is cached in the test client.
steps: Call POST /v1/auth/login with AcademicAdmin identifier and password.
Inspect HTTP 200 response for accessToken and role AcademicAdmin in data envelope.
Call GET /v1/me with Authorization Bearer token from login response.
Assert data exposes actor userId, role AcademicAdmin, and institution scope required for POST /v1/policies.
Proceed to POST /v1/policies using the same token and confirm HTTP 200 (authorized actor gate).
cases.expected: Auth gate per FR-15 and FR-36 succeeds: login returns AcademicAdmin token; GET /v1/me confirms privileged actor identity and scope; subsequent POST /v1/policies is authorized for FR-24 configuration.

cases.title: WF-01 academic setup optional step 4 configures section policy override via POST /v1/policies
preconditions: AcademicAdmin completes WF-01 steps 1–3: class section created, enrollments imported, sessions generated in Scheduled state.
Institution default policy exists with presentWindowMinutes 10.
No section-scoped override exists yet for the target class section.
steps: AcademicAdmin calls POST /v1/policies with scopeType ClassSection and presentWindowMinutes 25 plus other FR-24 fields.
Open a Scheduled session for the section and resolve effective policy at session scheduled start.
Verify WF-01 completion criterion: effective policy can be resolved at check-in time with section override values.
Confirm institution default fields not overridden still fall back from parent levels per BR-20.
cases.expected: WF-01 step 4 optional policy configuration succeeds; effective policy resolves with section-specific presentWindowMinutes 25; WF-01 completion criterion 'Optional policy configured — effective policy can be resolved at check-in time' is satisfied per FR-24, FR-25, BR-20.

cases.title: Academic Admin updates existing section policy via PATCH to change manual-edit window and GPS settings
preconditions: Active class-section policy exists with manualEditWindowHours 24 and gpsRequired false.
AcademicAdmin is authenticated.
Open or upcoming session exists for the section to observe downstream policy effect.
steps: Record beforeState: GET /v1/policies/{policyId} manualEditWindowHours and gpsRequired values.
Call PATCH /v1/policies/{policyId} setting manualEditWindowHours 72 and gpsRequired true with gpsRadiusMeters 150.
Record afterState via GET /v1/policies/{policyId}.
Resolve effective policy for the section and assert manualEditWindowHours 72 and gpsRequired true.
Verify unchanged fields (e.g. presentWindowMinutes) retain prior values.
cases.expected: Alternate configuration path updates persisted policy without re-creating scope row; afterState reflects new manual-edit window and GPS requirement; effective policy resolution immediately uses updated FR-24 fields per BR-20.

cases.title: Flow C audit verification after critical attendance policy configuration change
preconditions: Active section-scoped policy exists with gpsRequired false and known policyId.
AcademicAdmin is authenticated.
Audit query endpoint GET /v1/audit-logs is available to AcademicAdmin read scope.
steps: Record beforeState policy fields via GET /v1/policies/{policyId}.
AcademicAdmin calls PATCH /v1/policies/{policyId} changing absenceThresholdPercent from 20 to 25 and adminApprovalRequired from false to true.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with filters targetType AttendancePolicy, targetId policyId, and time range covering the mutation.
Verify audit payload includes actor, action type, old_value JSON with prior threshold and approval rule, new_value JSON with updated values, and timestamp.
cases.expected: Critical FR-24 policy mutation produces immutable audit record per BR-22 with actor AcademicAdmin, target policy id, old and new configuration snapshots; no mutation audit gap for privileged policy configuration changes.

cases.title: Configured gpsRequired policy drives GpsRequired rejection on POST /v1/check-ins
preconditions: Section-scoped policy configured with gpsRequired true via POST /v1/policies.
Open class session exists for the section with valid qrToken.
Authenticated enrolled student has no prior successful attendance.
Check-in request omits GPS location payload intentionally.
steps: AcademicAdmin confirms effective policy gpsRequired true for the session section.
Student calls POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and Authorization but without GPS coordinates.
Inspect HTTP 422 (or documented validation status) and error.code GpsRequired in response envelope.
Query GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance and assert student remains Pending with failed attempt logged.
cases.expected: FR-24 gpsRequired configuration flows to runtime check-in validation per AC-09: missing GPS payload is rejected with GpsRequired reason code; no Present/Late AttendanceRecord is created; policy configuration directly governs check-in behavior.

cases.title: Non-AcademicAdmin roles denied POST and PATCH /v1/policies
preconditions: Student, Lecturer, DepartmentAdmin, and ITAdmin test accounts exist with valid authentication tokens.
At least one attendance policy exists in the system.
AcademicAdmin control token is available to verify policy unchanged after denied attempts.
steps: Call POST /v1/policies with valid policy payload as Student, Lecturer, DepartmentAdmin, and ITAdmin.
Call PATCH /v1/policies/{policyId} as Lecturer and DepartmentAdmin.
Call GET /v1/policies as Student (AttendancePolicy.read Deny).
Query attendance_policies table or GET as AcademicAdmin to confirm no unauthorized mutations occurred.
cases.expected: All unauthorized role requests return HTTP 403 Forbidden per permission matrix (AttendancePolicy.update Deny for non-AcademicAdmin); Student denied policy list read; no policy rows created or modified by denied actors; no partial restricted policy datasets leaked.

cases.title: POST /v1/policies rejects contradictory present and late window configuration with 400 InvalidPayload
preconditions: AcademicAdmin is authenticated.
Target class section exists.
FRM-07 cross-field validation rules apply: present window must precede late window end without invalid overlap.
steps: Send POST /v1/policies with presentWindowMinutes 30 and lateWindowMinutes 10 such that late window ends before present window end (contradictory configuration).
Read HTTP status and error.code from response envelope.
Query attendance_policies for the target scope and confirm no row was created.
Repeat with absenceThresholdPercent 150 (outside 0–100 range) and confirm rejection.
cases.expected: API returns HTTP 400 with InvalidPayload or equivalent validation error for contradictory windows and out-of-range absence threshold; no attendance_policies row is persisted for invalid payloads per FRM-07 validation rules.

cases.title: Policy create rejects gpsRadiusMeters when gpsRequired is false
preconditions: AcademicAdmin auth context is available.
Class section fixture exists.
Database CHECK constraint requires gps_radius_meters > 0 when present.
steps: Submit policy configuration with gpsRequired false and gpsRadiusMeters 100.
Observe API or service-layer validation response.
Submit policy with gpsRequired true and gpsRadiusMeters 0 or negative.
Confirm neither invalid payload persists a row in attendance_policies.
cases.expected: gpsRadiusMeters is only accepted when gpsRequired is true per FRM-07 field gating; zero or negative radius is rejected; gpsRequired false with radius payload returns validation error without persistence.

cases.title: Academic Admin browser journey on PG-12 policies list with scopeLevel filter and pagination
preconditions: AcademicAdmin is logged in on desktop Chromium.
Admin navigation exposes Policies page at /admin/policies.
Multiple policies exist across institution, course, and class-section scope levels.
steps: Navigate to /admin/policies and verify TableToolbar, DataTable, and policy columns (scope level, scope name, updated timestamp).
Apply scopeLevel filter to ClassSection and verify active filter chip renders per FR-TTB-02.
Verify pagination controls show 'Showing X–Y of Z' with scoped count only.
Sort by updatedAt descending and confirm table order updates without full page reload.
cases.expected: PG-12 displays paginated policy list with scopeLevel filter, sort, and search per listing matrix §PG-12; filtered results remain within AcademicAdmin authorized scope; table state syncs with route query params.

cases.title: FRM-07 policy form gates GPS radius field and PolicyResolutionSummary previews effective precedence
preconditions: AcademicAdmin is logged in on /admin/policies create or edit route.
Institution default policy and course-level override exist for a target class section hierarchy.
PolicyResolutionSummary (DC-09) component is rendered on the form.
steps: Open FRM-07 create/edit form and set scope level radio to class section.
Enter present window, late window, absence threshold, manual-edit window, and excused-absence toggle values.
Toggle GPS required off and verify GPS radius (m) field is disabled or hidden.
Toggle GPS required on and verify GPS radius field becomes editable with default 100.
Inspect PolicyResolutionSummary accordion showing precedence chain (section → course → faculty → institution) and resolved effective values before save.
Submit valid form and observe success feedback; confirm new or updated policy appears in PG-12 list.
cases.expected: FRM-07 enforces cross-field GPS gating per FR-24; PolicyResolutionSummary previews BR-20 precedence resolution with per-field source level; save succeeds and PG-12 reflects the configured policy without silent field drops.
